name: The Lab Golf Indoor Golf Studios
about: The Lab Golf Indoor Golf Studios is a premium indoor golf facility powered by Trackman's tour-proven technology. It offers a variety of services including simulator bay rentals, virtual golf on world-class courses, professional lessons, and custom club fitting. The facility is designed to provide golfers with detailed insights into their ball flight and swing dynamics through advanced data tracking. With options for both casual play and serious practice, The Lab caters to a wide range of golfers looking to improve their game in a modern, high-tech environment.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to premium Trackman technology for detailed swing and ball flight analysis
Extensive library of training aids available at no extra cost
Ability to play realistic virtual golf on top courses worldwide in stunning HD quality
Professional coaching available for golfers of all skill levels
Short game practice area for a complete training experience

food_and_drink.notes: Bring your own food and beverages are allowed for private events.
No mention of alcohol service. BYOB is allowed for private events.

simulator_hardware.notes: Tour-proven technology providing detailed insights into ball flight and swing dynamics

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The Lab provides an extensive library of training aids and equipment for use. Club rentals and custom fitting services are also available.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, you are allowed to bring your own food and beverages. For private events, you can bring your own food and drinks.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The average person takes around 45-60 minutes to play a full round. Fast players can finish in about 30 minutes. It's recommended to book 1 hour per player to include warm-up time.

faq.question: Is The Lab kid-friendly?
faq.answer: There is no specific information regarding child-friendly policies or junior programs mentioned on the website.
